answer: We keep it simple. The Full Reading is $9.90 and live now (launch price, rising to $15 as we grow). Compatibility ($9.90) and the Reading + Compatibility bundle ($14.90) are coming soon. Once your payment is confirmed, a personal link to your reading is emailed to you, usually within a few hours.

Right now the Full Reading is $9.90 at launch price. The bigger deal is coming: the Reading + Compatibility bundle at $14.90 instead of $19.80. Promo codes may appear later; the bundle will always be there.
You can pay in US dollars via Wise, or in crypto (USDT, BTC, ETH and more). After your payment is confirmed, we email you a personal link to your reading, usually within a few hours.
If something went wrong with your order, like a wrong birth date, a duplicate payment, or a reading that never arrived, write to us and we'll fix it or refund you. Honest product, honest support.
Usually within a few hours. We confirm your payment, then email you a personal link to your full reading. No waiting days, and the link stays yours forever.

Your blueprint is 13 points across four traditions: 9 from numerology (Life Path, Expression, Soul Urge and more), your Sun sign, Chinese zodiac animal and element, and your tarot birth card. Each one comes with a full interpretation in the paid reading.
The quiz above is free: enter your name and birth date and we calculate a real slice of your 13-point profile on the spot. No account, no card.
The Compatibility reading ($9.90) looks at how two people fit: connection and conflict style across the key points. For couples the bundle (Reading + Compatibility, $14.90) is the smart pick.
We use your name and birth date only to calculate your reading. Details are in our Privacy Policy (link in the footer).

Every point traces back to a documented framework: Pythagorean numerology, tropical astrology, the Chinese calendar, the Major Arcana. We'd rather be honest than impressive: it's a named method, not "the universe says".
